Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Excellent work. The enemy was clever, but you came out on top.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You did good too, Takeba. It's no wonder you volunteered.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You were able to remain calm during the enemy's mental assault.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Maybe you're finally starting to recognize yourself as a leader. Keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It feels like the level of trust[n]between us all has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}All right, let's call it a night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Um, about that thing you mentioned the other day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}All right! We should head back, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Fuuka played a big role in this one again. Seems like the second-years are really putting in the work![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Looks like you're really shining out there, {f 4 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Don't tell me you're jealous someone else is getting all the attention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We successfully defeated the[n]Shadows this month, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There should be fewer victims for a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But I'm too exhausted to[n]think about all that right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should hurry back to the[n]dorm and get some rest...[n]{f 1 1}
